title: deer-flow.stack-tuner.integrity.warn v1
description: Out-of-band integrity warning surfaced during a stack-tuner stage. Distinct from a stage error: the stage may still be ok=true while a downstream parser flags a structural problem (e.g. critic verdict not extractable). Drives dashboard 'integrity issues' counter.

ok.description: stage's own ok flag — warn can fire even when stage.ok=true

answer_preview.description: first ~200 chars of the offending payload for triage
